Chef Bernice Tan

A food artist,
presenting ideas
through edible
concepts.

I do not consider myself a chef in the traditional sense — rather, a food artist presenting ideas through edible concepts. Each dish tells a story through vibrant flavours, crafted from scratch with seasonal ingredients.

While I have a fulfilling career in the energy sector, cooking is a passion I deeply enjoy. I love to curate a limited number of private dining events for like-minded individuals. Quality is always my highest priority — with limited slots each month.

My attention has shifted toward the narrative behind each dish — the stories of ingredients, the use of seasonal herbs, and the exploration of unexpected yet harmonious combinations.

"Each dish tells a story through vibrant flavours, crafted from scratch with seasonal ingredients. To me, cooking is a form of conceptual art. I look forward to co-creating a unique and memorable culinary experience with you."
Sample menus

No fixed dishes.
Each experience is
a new exploration.

There are always seasonal ingredients that arrive as a quiet surprise for the guests. Every dining experience is conceived fresh — the menus below give a sense of the range, never a fixed script.

2026 · Asian Flora & Herbs

Spring Contemporary Tasting Menu

A refined celebration of vibrant flavours, presenting distinctive less commonly found dishes with premium seasonal ingredients only.

Snow Crab Tartelette | Mekong Spices | Petals
Argentine Prawn Tartare | Yuzu | Toasted Sesame
Cured Hokkaido Scallop | Nam Jim Jaew | Banana Flower
Applewood-Smoked Duck | Jungle Green Curry | Herb Rice
Poached White Eggplant | Osmanthus Tea | Peach Gum
2026 · Italian & Mediterranean

Creative Tasting Menu

A wholesome Italian and Mediterranean experience highlighting local artisanal craftsmanship and the finest European seasonal produce.

Snow Crab & Trout Tartelette | Herbs & Petals
Iberian Pork Jowls | Spiced Chimichurri | Watermelon Salsa
Grilled Pearl Grouper | Purple Potato Gnocchi | Pistachio Pesto
Pine Nut & Porcini Soup | Barley | White Truffle Oil
Dark Chocolate Gelato | Fermented Dark Cherries | Hazelnuts
Plant-Forward · Award-Winning

Veggitude Flora Table

Asian and Mediterranean experience highlighting the freshest seasonal plant-forward ingredients. Winner — GlobalChefs Singapore 2025, Vegan Category.

Chestnut Pumpkin | Roasted Maple Tahini | Dukkah
Crispy Breadfruit | Sriracha Emulsion | Pineapple Salsa

Small Bites Tasting Reception

A bespoke barbecue experience featuring premium, ready-to-grill ingredients complemented by freshly crafted sauces and curated side dishes.

Always

No fixed menu.
Every evening
is new.

These menus are a window into the range — not a script. Every engagement begins with a conversation, and the final menu responds to the season, the occasion and you.

Begin your experience →
How it works

From the first conversation
to the final course.

01

We connect

Tell me about the occasion, your guests and your preferences. Every engagement begins with a personal conversation — not a booking form.

02

I design your menu

The menu is conceived around what is seasonal and exceptional at the time of your event. No two menus are identical — every dish is crafted from scratch.

03

I come to you

Your home, your venue, your event space. I arrive with everything needed and leave your kitchen as I found it. You experience only the meal.

04

An evening to remember

Each dish arrives with its story. Courses are paced around your evening. Quality is my highest priority — which is why availability is deliberately limited.

Experiences

Artful Private Dining

For intimate celebrations and special gatherings — bespoke tasting menus within a welcoming and elegant atmosphere, creating space for unforgettable moments.

Storytelling Social Catering

Boutique-style event catering with colourful flavour and presentation. Each dish crafted to elevate the occasion, inspire conversation and foster meaningful connections.

Corporate Private Dining

For Singapore's business community — bespoke menus for client entertaining, team events and corporate receptions where the quality of the experience matters.

What guests
remember.

Every engagement is a co-creation. These are the words of guests who experienced Chef Bernice's tasting menus across private and corporate settings in Singapore.

Chef Bernice's Asian fusion tasting menu in Singapore is the most memorable private dining experience I've had. Her mastery of bold flavour with those special seasonal herbs and ingredients is exceptional, and every course at the private chef's table was presented with elegance and intention.
Emma P. · Private tasting menu
Private dining in Singapore at its finest — Chef Bernice's chef's table was truly unforgettable. Her Asian Mediterranean tasting menu seamlessly blended Asian and Italian influences into dishes that were both inventive and deeply comforting. She creates an intimate dining experience that makes every guest feel genuinely welcomed.
David L. · Chef's table
Chef Bernice curated a seasonal tasting menu in Singapore that exceeded every expectation. Each course was beautifully presented, thoughtfully composed, and full of bold yet refined flavours. Her deeply personalised private dining approach elevated the entire evening into something truly special.
Sarah M. · Private dinner
We engaged Chef Bernice for a corporate private dining event in Singapore and she delivered an extraordinary Asian fusion tasting menu. Her professionalism, warmth and command of the private chef's table made a lasting impression — exactly what boutique catering in Singapore should feel like.
Michael T. · Corporate event
